name: UwsPNewDirRvnuExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_s0 AS (SELECT RVNU_CD, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.NEWDIR_RVNU), cte_s1 AS (SELECT RVNU_CD, USER_ID, SUBSTRING(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,1,10) AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM cte_s0) SELECT RVNU_CD, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM cte_s1
